title: Pisum quadratum
taxonomy: Pisum quadratum belongs to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. This classification is based on its shared characteristics with other members of the family, including its flower structure and leaf morphology. As a member of the genus Pisum, Pisum quadratum is further classified as a type of pea. The genus Pisum is part of the tribe Fabeae, which also includes other legumes. Pisum quadratum's classification helps scientists understand its evolutionary relationships and genetic makeup.
